meaning: n.草地,草坪,(均匀生长于固体培养基的)菌苔
examples: I mow the lawn every week in summer.
There were ducks quacking on the lawn.
She ran swiftly over the lawn to the gate.
She was reduced to having to petition the court for money to get her lawn mowed.
An Astroturf lawn and speakers are available for those who would rather walk in.
